temporal_description: A man with glasses and a light green suit jacket sits in a dimly lit room, illuminated by a cool, blue-green light. He is looking down intently at a small, dark object he holds in both hands, manipulating it with his fingers. In the dark background, another person is partially visible, standing near a doorway. The camera is focused on the man in the foreground, creating a shallow depth of field that blurs the background. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The audio is filled with a low, ominous, and suspenseful ambient score that creates a tense and mysterious atmosphere. A sharp, metallic click, like a small object being placed firmly on a hard surface, punctuates the quiet, echoing ambiance. The camera cuts to a close-up of a gold Rolex watch with a white face. The watch is resting on a dark surface. A hand enters the frame from the right and gently touches the watch, as if to inspect it. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera shifts to a close-up profile shot of a man in a white collared shirt. He has a serious and focused expression as he looks off-screen. The lighting is the same cool, blue-green hue. The background is dark and out of focus, with the blurred silhouette of another person visible beside him. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right corner.
